author: Hidetoshi Itakura / 板倉英俊
scope: Superstring Emptiness String / Brane / Membrane Runtime

theorem_targets.name: non_reification_required
theorem_targets.informal_statement: Any admissible EmptinessString must satisfy the non-reification guard.

theorem_targets.name: two_truths_gap_required
theorem_targets.informal_statement: Any admissible EmptinessString must preserve the Two Truths gap guard.

theorem_targets.name: membrane_authority_non_expansion_required
theorem_targets.informal_statement: Any admissible LayerMembrane must preserve authority non-expansion.

theorem_targets.name: obstruction_visibility_required
theorem_targets.informal_statement: Any admissible packet must preserve obstruction visibility.

theorem_targets.name: StringIsNotSubstance
theorem_targets.informal_statement: A string in this runtime is a dependent relational vibration trace, not a substance.

theorem_targets.name: BraneIsNotAbsoluteWorld
theorem_targets.informal_statement: A brane is a local world-support surface, not an absolute world.

theorem_targets.name: MembraneIsNotFinalAuthority
theorem_targets.informal_statement: A membrane governs boundary passage but cannot open final authority.

theorem_targets.name: IndraNetGraphOnlyReductionForbidden
theorem_targets.informal_statement: IndraNet coupling must remain gauge-theoretic and may not be reduced to graph-only representation.

theorem_targets.name: GluingDoesNotEraseObstruction
theorem_targets.informal_statement: Successful local-global gluing does not erase obstruction or residue visibility.
